_description: Per-phase schema growth measurements supporting Figure 4 of the paper. Each phase row corresponds to a phase-closing git snapshot in the development repository. The 'Released' row reflects the v1.0.0 state after a cross-phase refactoring (e.g., hasRelatedTR added; unused Meeting attributes removed; net -6 DPs and +2 OPs).
_caveat: Phase-closing commit hashes live in the company-internal development repository (referenced from docs/paper/iswc/figures/fig4_schema_growth.py); only the per-phase counts and the released v1.0.0 ontology are publicly redistributable.

phases.scope: TS section structure and intra-spec links

refactoring_notes: hasRelatedTR added for explicit WorkItem-TR linkage
